$comment: SINGLE SOURCE of the FrameGraph viewer's DECLARED render surface. Gated against schema/framegraph-v2.schema.json (itself byte-gated to models/framegraph.py by schema-check) by viewer/dev/schema-contract.mjs and tests/test_viewer_schema_contract.py. Closes drift-risk-map Finding C7: a model type added/removed without updating this file now fails CI instead of silently producing a viewer that mis-renders or drops it. supported = types the viewer renders; unsupported = model types it knowingly does NOT render yet (with reason); extensions = supported types that are out-of-core-profile and intentionally absent from the schema (the UML zoo, decorative containers).

flow_types.column_break: Multi-column page regions are not laid out by the viewer yet; the block is dropped rather than starting a new column.
flow_types.keep_together: Pagination/keep-with-next is a print concern the single-scroll viewer does not model.
flow_types.image: Flow-level image blocks are not rendered; absolute image objects (object_types.image) are.

inline_kinds.ref: Cross-reference resolution (target numbering) is not implemented; would render as a dangling number.
inline_kinds.cite: Bibliographic citation resolution against defs.data (CSL) is not implemented.
